intent: Marketplace launch polish for Plumbline: capitalize action.yml name and switch branding to target/blue (reviewer advised against the generic shield); add a 'Why Plumbline' section, the real Codex-authored Plumbline brand kit (assets/plumbline-mark, plumbline-lockup, plumbline-social-preview in .svg + .png) with the lockup SVG as the README hero, and a rendered sample REVIEW failure-capsule to the README; cosmetic proofgate-drift cleanup in tests/comments (temp-dir prefixes, command-name descriptions) while keeping ALL backward-compat surfaces (.proofgate/ dual-dir resolution, PROOFGATE_* env aliases, proofgate bin alias, legacy comment/footer matching); and document every retained proofgate alias so no reader mistakes it for drift (README compatibility note + inline back-compat comments).

validation_plan.reason: Typecheck the src comment/edit changes compile cleanly (no functional change, but confirms nothing broke).
The cosmetic test renames (temp-dir prefixes, description strings) and unchanged behavior must still pass the full 218-test suite; CI runs this as the 'test' check.

validation_plan.command: npm run bundle && git diff --exit-code dist/index.js
validation_plan.reason: Src comment edits are carried into the committed bundle; re-bundle so the committed dist/index.js matches src (dist-check CI enforces this).

execution_evidence.output_ref: dist/index.js 240.4kb; re-bundled and committed so it matches src

result_summary: Marketplace launch polish. action.yml: name 'Plumbline', branding target/blue. README: 'Why Plumbline' section (verbatim), logo referenced top-right, social-preview-must-be-uploaded-as-PNG comment (points at assets/plumbline-social-preview.png), a rendered sample REVIEW capsule (banner, shape pass, semantic notes, a human item, an advisory item, footer) based on the real src/github.ts render, and a 'Compatibility / legacy naming' note explaining the retained proofgate aliases. Added the real Codex-authored brand kit: assets/plumbline-mark.{svg,png}, plumbline-lockup.{svg,png}, plumbline-social-preview.{svg,png}; README hero uses the self-contained lockup SVG. Cosmetic proofgate-drift cleanup: renamed test temp-dir prefixes (proofgate-base-/proofgate-diff- -> plumbline-*) and command-name test descriptions/comments (proofgate schema/stamp -> plumb). Documented every retained back-compat proofgate surface with inline comments (provider.ts, review.ts, cli.ts, ci.ts, github.ts). ALL backward-compat preserved: .proofgate/ dual-dir resolution, PROOFGATE_* env aliases, proofgate bin alias, .gitignore, MISSION invariant, CHANGELOG record, and the legacy footer match. self_modifying: true (touches src/github.ts, action.yml, .plumbline/** — protected paths). Verified: tsc clean, 218/218 tests pass, dist re-bundled to match src.
